For low bombarding energy: natural zinc and sample
aluminium after deposition of 1 angstrom silver.
For higher bombarding energy: commercial 13 microm
foils when beam loss per foil < 1 MeV.
Maximum incident alpha beam energies measured via
observed range in stacks of aluminium plus blue
bleaching indicates the depth of beam penetration.
Range of alpha particles in zinc was determined
relative to that in aluminium by experiments with
combinations of zinc, aluminium and blue cellophane.
